title: What we know on Day 24 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

President Donald Trump has abruptly announced that the United States and Iran are discussing ending the war and said he will hold off military strikes against Iranian power and energy sites for five days.

Trump made the early morning announcement after he had threatened to pummel Iran’s power plants on Monday evening unless it reopened the Strait of Hormuz, which has put the global economy in a chokehold.

As ever, communities on the ground are bearingthe bruntof the violence. The US-Israeli assault on Iran and retaliatory Iranian strikesin the region, along with the expanding Israeli offensive in Lebanon, have killed thousands of people, including hundreds of children, according to rights groups and health authorities.

Here’s what to know on Day 24.
